The series tackles issues that include personal empowerment, socialization, self-esteem, appreciation of nature and school issues.

programme.title: Numberblocks
programme.desc: The adventures of friends who can always count on each other.

programme.title: The Might And The Magic
programme.desc: Aaron races across the kingdom to gather the NEXO-Knights as Jestro and his Destructive Monsters attack the King's Castle. The Knights must get back to the capitol in time, or Jestro will rule the kingdom! Jestro, while still attacking the King's Castle, has second thoughts until the Book of Monsters orders the mad jester to feed him another magic book he's found (and has been saving.) It's the powerful “Book of Revenge!” Now, combining the powers of Revenge and Destruction, Jestro and his monsters will get their vengeance on King Halbert and the Kingdom of Knighton. Jestro and his monsters lay siege…will they destroy the castle?! Meanwhile, Aaron races across the Kingdom gathering the NEXO-Knights one at a time. As each Knight rejoins the group, they become a more and more powerful team. They even get Robin to join them as the Black Knight in his repaired power suit. Our Knights arrive, finally regrouped, fight off Jestro, save the castle and the King. It's a glorious victory! The King is so pleased after seeing how the brave NEXO-Knights saved his kingdom, he allows Macy to join them as an official NEXO-Knight.

programme.title: The Rise Of The Great Devourer
programme.desc: The ninja haste to the lost city of Ouroboros to try to stop Pythor from awaking The Great Devourer but it is a race against time.

programme.title: Back To School
programme.desc: When the NEXO-Knights are sloppy in a fight with Jestro, Merlok 2.0 sends them back to the Knights' Academy. Not only for a brush-up but to find out what Jestro is after in its hallowed halls. As they Knights battle Jestro – in a somewhat haphazard and lazy way – they discuss the fact that Jestro never wins and that they're always getting over on him. Despite defeating the jerky Jester and his evil Book, Merlok 2.0 discovers that something about the attack on the village is tied to the Knights' Academy. It looks like that's where they'll strike next. It wouldn't hurt for the Knights to go “back to school” to watch for Jestro and for some refresher training. Merlok is sure Jestro wants something at the Academy, but he doesn't know what it is. The Knights are very much “fish out of water” at the academy, even with the “cool kids” – Robin and Ava – showing them around. The next generation of Knights is being taught to integrate the NEXO-Magic of Merlok into their fighting techniques and these kids are good (so good, they initially kick the lazy, know-it-all Knight's butts!) Their old principal, the ever-ornery Headmaster Brickland, sets them straight: they're all still slackers, and they better get their acts together (especially Lance!) The Knights take shifts as “library helpers” much to the delight of the old squirebot librarian, MARGE. They're convinced Jestro is after a book…isn't he always after a book? When Jestro attacks, the Knights help organize the students and there's a big fight in the Academy Library versus Jestro and his Monsters. They drive Jestro off without letting him steal any books! Victory! But as Jestro leaves, we see him holding what the Book of Monsters really wanted: a snow globe with a castle in it that was sitting on the librarian's desk. In the Lava Lands, Jestro throws the snow globe into a volcano and it frees the massive Castle of Monstrux from its snowy magic prison

programme.title: Getting Tthe Message
programme.desc: As the Friends enjoy Heartlake Amusement Park, Emma types a text to Mia, but sends it to Matthew by mistake a text that could be mega-embarrassing for Emma! As her BFF's, the Friends race to find Matthew's phone and erase the text before he reads it. But first, they must brave space rides, dunking booths and worse: the boys locker room! What's more frightening than a roller coaster? Moretwisted than a funhouse mirror? A text gone wrong! TheFriends' fun day at Heartlake Amusement Park turns into afrantic race against time when Emma discovers that herinnocent text to Mia was sent to Matthew by mistake -- atext that accidentally sounds like a pledge of Emma'sundying love for Matthew! Mega-embarrassing! As Emma'sBFF's, the Friends must scramble to retrieve Matthew'sphone and erase the text before he reads it. But first,they need to brave space rides, dunking booths, an angrybrute and worse - the boys locker room!

programme.title: Day Of The Great Devourer
programme.desc: Disaster threatens as the ninja must fight to defeat the all consuming Great Devourer in a desperate attempt to save Ninjago.

programme.title: Greed Is Good?
programme.desc: When Jestro uses the Book of Greed to rob Auremville of its riches, he also gets Lance's parents as prisoners and these demanding rich folks are too much for even monsters to handle. Jestro's not sure what to do with his new castle in the Lava Lands. “Every castle needs a big chamber filled with treasure” says the Book of Monsters so they've got to go out looting! The BOM convinces Jestro to call forth GENERAL MAGMAR, and Jestro appoints him as “general manager” of “castle operations,” much to Magmar's dismay. Meanwhile, Jestro and the BOM find the BOOK OF GREED. This will allow them to make greedy, rapacious monsters that will bring them all the treasure they want to fill their castle! They'll head to the richest town in the realm – AUREMVILLE! Meanwhile, in Auremville, the NEXO-Knights arrive for a huge “Gold is Good” ball at Lance's house. When the Monsters finally arrive in Auremville, a battle breaks out and the greedy monsters make off with everything…including Lance's parents, Goldie and Cuthbert Richmond who are clad in the finest golden garments and so look valuable! Lance will now be forced to live…poor. The Knights have to get his parents back. Meanwhile, his parents – Cuthbert and Goldie Richmond –think their imprisonment in Jestro's gold-filled castle is a “spa holiday” with the worst service. They order Magmar and the monsters around like servants and drive them all crazy. The Knights pile into the Fortrex and head for the Lava Lands, formulating a plan along the way to free Lance's parents. In a village half-way to Jestro's Castle, the Knights run into…Jestro and his monsters headed the other way with Lance's parents and all the gold they've stolen. There's a big fight, until they realize they might have the same goal and decide to deal. The BOM wants to give them back all the gold and Lance's parents. Lance says “No deal.” “We'll take the gold, you can keep my parents.” It's a weird and comical stand-off. Finally, Clay convinces Lance he has to take his parents back even if they don't always get along (and, it's the only way to get the gold back.)

programme.title: Darkness Shall Rise
programme.desc: Just as the rebuilding effort in Ninjago begins, the four ninjas come to realize that evil has started to resurface with Lord Garmadon forging the ninjas' lost Golden Weapons into a Mega-Weapon with unspeakable powers.With the Devourer destroyed, Ninjago is saved and the rebuilding effort begins. Without their Golden Weapons, the Ninja are stripped of their elemental powers. And with their flying ship ‘The Destiny's Bounty' destroyed, the Ninja are forced to find a new home in the city. Meanwhile, Lord Garmadon resurfaces and gains control of the Serpentine as well as transforms the Bounty's wreckage to become ‘The Black Bounty'. The Ninja will battle Scales and discover evil has begun to resurface in Ninjago, while Lord Garmadon will successfully forge the Golden Weapons into a Mega-Weapon with unspeakable powers.

programme.title: The Book Of Obsession
programme.desc: The Knights are tasked with protecting the King's valuable Ned Knights comic book during the Bookingheim Knight-a-Con. But with all the costumed kids there, will they recognize the real Jestro and Book of Monsters coming to get them? King Halbert instructs the Knights that they must take his valuable Ned Knights comic book to the “Knight-a-Kon” in Bookingham. It will be the first be first prize at the Knight-a-Kon. But the Book of Monsters wants the book, too. Having devoured Ned Knightly comic books in it's down time it has become fanatically obsessed with the storyline. General Magmar suggests they simply attack the place and take what they want, but Jestro tells them they can't: everyone will be in costume and they'll be thousands of comics there. This calls for a clever “infiltration” mission (which will also allow Jestro to see the Kon, which he's always wanted to do.) So Jestro goes into the Kon with the BOM and some monsters. And it's easy because everyone is in costume Jestro, the BOM and their monsters fit right in at the convention and Clay and crew have their work cut out for them trying to separate fiend from fan. Macy keeps going on-and-on about the story in the King's comic book as the Knights keep a watchful eye on it. Robin even shows up in the “Minitrex” – a small version of the Fortrex he built just for the Knight-a-Kon. He's convinced he can win the costume competition that is the big closing event for the Kon. At the end of the Kon there's a big awards ceremony for “Best Costume.” The prize: “Ned Knightly, Knight of Knighton, Issue #1.” The BOM must get it and scheme to get closer to it during the costume contest. He's just…about…to get the book when…the impatient Magmar attacks! Everyone thinks it's part of the big show! “Ned Knightly, Knight of Knighton, Issue #1” is tossed from person-to-person-to-person in the melee. The Knights must do something, but they're too far away from the Fortrex to download any NEXO-Power. Robin pulls up in his Minitrex they can use it to get NEXO-Power! Robin wins the best costume for his Minitrex and wins the Ned Knightly Comic which he then gives to Macy…she deserves to read it.

programme.title: The Drooling Detective
programme.desc: When ruthless dognappers steal Mia's dog Toffee from the Heartlake City Dog Talent Show, it's up to the Friends to play detective and track down the culprits, with the help of an unlikely hero: Stephanie's borrowed sad-sack bloodhound, Benchley. Andrea and her singing dog act, the Howlers, are a sure bet to win the Heartlake City Dog Talent Show – in spite of stiff competition from Tanya's dancing poodle, Olivia's Robo-Dog, and even Stephanie's sad-sack borrowed bloodhound, Benchley. But when an unscrupulous mother-and-son dog-napping team steals the Howlers' best singer, Mia's dog Toffee, it's up to the Friends to rescue him and catch the baddies with the help of the Hero Of The Day – Benchley!

programme.title: Pirates Vs. Ninja
programme.desc: When Garmadon by accident brings to life the original owners of the Black Bounty – the ruthless Captain Soto and his Pirates - it is up to our ninjas to stop them from plundering Ninjago City. Sharing a tiny, one-bedroom apartment in the city, the Ninja take Lloyd to Grand Sensei Darreth's Mojo Dojo to begin training. There, they discover Lloyd has all four of their natural elemental abilities. Meanwhile, Lord Garmadon discovers his Mega-Weapon can't destroy, only create what the user wishes. By accident, Garmadon brings to life the original owners of the Black Bounty: Captain Soto and his Pirates, and they mutiny the ship. Answering the age-old question of who would win a fight between pirates and ninja, it's up to our ninja to stop Captain Soto and his men from plundering Ninjago City. In the end, Ninjago City is saved, the Pirates are arrested and Lord Garmadon escapes once again with their Black Bounty.

programme.title: The King's Tournament
programme.desc: Rival to the King, Jorah Tightwad thinks his knights – the Tighty Knighties – are easily better than the NEXO-Knights, so he challenges King Halbert to prove who's better during the King's Birthday Tournament. It's the King's birthday! To celebrate, the Queen and Macy always throw him a great, big birthday party consisting of a feast on birthday eve and a tournament the next day. At the birthday banquet is JORAH TIGHTWAD (last seen in episode 104.) He's goading the King (and on his birthday, even) and going on and on about how his knights are better than the NEXO-Knights. The King protests, but Jorah asks “How many magical books have your knights recovered? None, zilch, zero.” But he produces the BOOK OF ENVY, which his superior knights captured from Jestro. The next day, the NEXO-Knights square off against Tightwad's four knights: JOUSTING BEEBER, BRICKNEY SPEARS, SHIA LABLADE and THE BLOK. We see that all these knights are envious of the NEXO-Knights: their weapons, their fame, their hair, etc. Macy is also disappointed to find out she CAN'T fight in the tournament – she's agreed to be in “princess mode” for her father's birthday. During the tournament, we see that Tightwad's knights are amazing in fighting contests. They all pair-off with knights who have their same weapons skills. Tightwad makes fun of the NEXO-Knights as his knights do well. Jestro and the Book of Monsters discover that Tightwad has the Book of Envy and he and his monsters attack the tournament. Then we learn that Tightwad's knights might be good tournament fighters, but they can't handle real fights and the NEXO-Knights must save them! Macy is finally able to join in the fight when she sees Magmar show up on the flank. The NEXO-Knights successfully defend the king, but Jestro gets away with the Book of Envy. Tightwad must admit his knights never won the book from Jestro he got the book when Merlok blasted books of magic across the realm. Tightwad's knights all admit that they really admire the NEXO-Knights.

programme.title: Rabbitouille
programme.desc: It's Stephanie vs. Tanya on a TV Bake-Off to end all bake-offs! Stephanie concocts a fabulous cake, and Sneaky Tanya steals the recipe -- but neither knows that pet bunny Daisy has added a secret key ingredient. Will Stephanie's frantic efforts to win at all costs end her friendship with her BFF's? It's Stephanie vs. Tanya on a TV Bake-Off to end all bake-offs! After the duo's rivalry brings Aunt Sophie's Adopt-A-Pet Fair to a disastrous end, a contrite Stephanie wants to make amends with the prize money from a TV Bake-Off show. At home, Stephanie practices baking a delicious cake, and Tanya steals the recipe. But neither girl knows that Stephanie's pet bunny has inadvertently added a secret ingredient, ensuring that no one can repeat the recipe. A frustrated Stephanie freaks out, nearly ending her friendship with the girls – until they discover the bunny's secret and race to help Stephanie win.

programme.title: Double Trouble
programme.desc: When our heroes are invited back to Darkly's Boarding School, they discover it's a trap set up by Lord Garmadon and his evil replica ninjas created by Garmadon's new Mega-Weapo. Realizing how to correctly wield the Mega-Weapon, Lord Garmadon creates evil replicas of the Ninja to face off with our heroes. Meanwhile, Lloyd and the Ninja are invited back the Darkly's Boarding School, only to discover it's a trap and now the bad kids have seized control of the school. With the Ninja trapped in the school with the faculty, things spiral out of control as the Evil Replica Ninja arrive. As an awesome battle takes place in the school halls, the Ninja manage to outsmart their evil versions, and warn Lord Garmadon they're ready for whatever else he throws at them.

programme.title: Monster Chef
programme.desc: Axl and Chef Éclair must enter a cooking contest to try to keep Jestro from getting the hottest chili recipe in the realm. Knighton celebrity chef GOBBLETON RAMBLEY announces that he's developed the hottest chili recipe ever created. Now, he intends to give the recipe to the winner of his “Hottest Chili Cook-Off Competition” cooking show on Knighton TV. He'll turn over his famous Chili Cookbook with the hottest chili recipe on the last page. It's so unique it can't be recreated without it. Jestro and the Book of Monsters think they MUST have that recipe. “Hot chili makes hot monsters!” Merlok knows that this recipe, in the wrong hands – meaning Jestro's – could be dangerous. But when the Knights appeal to the egomaniacal chef, he says the only way to get the recipe is to win it from him. So Axl and Chef Éclair decide to enter. The team that creates the hottest chili will win Rambley's cookbook. Chef Éclair is unsure that Axl has the skills to help them win the competition, but, as we see through funny cooking show bits, Axl is quite good and they become a pretty good team. (We will also learn that years ago, Rambley stole one of Éclair's best recipes and they don't like each other.) While watching the multi-part competition, Aaron and Lance have a contest of their own: who can eat the hottest chili. Axl and Éclair actually win the competition, coming up with a raging hot chili recipe. Before they can claim their prize, Jestro and his monsters attack with Magmar leading the way on his siege tower. They must get that cookbook! During the battle, Rambley's cookbook is accidentally melted. After the battle, Rambley announces his new quest: to make the sweetest ice cream ever! While Axl and Éclair cook happily in the kitchen of the Fortrex, back in the Redoubt of Ruination, Jestro and Lavaria are attempting to recreate Rambley's chili recipe. They keep spooning various recipes of chili into the Book of Monsters. “Nope, not hot enough…waaaay too much garlic….you call that hot?!” (BELCH!)

programme.title: Change Of Address
programme.desc: When Stephanie's mom leaves her in charge of their house for a few days, it's finally Stephanie's chance to prove she can handle responsibility alone. Naturally, everything that can go wrong does go wrong – especially when the entire house disappears! When Stephanie's mom leaves her in charge of their house for a few days, it's finally Stephanie's chance to prove she can handle responsibility alone. But after fending off Andrea's party plans, a Home Alone-style break-in (by the hapless Snivel, trying to retrieve incriminating evidence of the Mayor's latest scheme), and finally the entire house disappearing (“Uh, think Stephanie's Mom will notice?”), Stephanie comes to appreciate that responsibility is a lot harder than it looks.

programme.title: Ninjaball Run
programme.desc: When the ninja learn that Darreth's Mojo Dojo is to be destroyed and Darreth doesn't have the money to save it, our heroes enter the annual NinjaBall Run to win its cash prize in order to save the dojo. As Lloyd continues to train and unlock his hidden powers, the Ninja learn land developers are going to destroy Darreth's Mojo Dojo unless Darreth can find the money to save it. The Ninja decide to enter their Ninja Tank into the annual NinjaBall Run cross-country rally to try to win its cash prize. Revisiting past characters who also enter the race, the high-speed derby will only grow more dangerous as Garmadon enters his Black Bounty, realizing this is the perfect chance to use his Mega-Weapon and rid the ninja. In the end, the Ninja will discover a few secrets within their Ninja Tank, allowing them to beat Garmadon's Bounty by a millisecond and saving Darreth's Dojo with their well-deserved cash prize. And as a final surprise, the Ninja steal back the Destiny's Bounty and make it their own once again.

programme.title: Knight Out
programme.desc: When the other NEXO-Knights decide they need a vacation from Clay, they send him on a holiday not knowing that he's going to a resort that houses an evil book or that Jestro will be heading there, too. Clay needs a vacation. Or, actually, the knights need a vacation from Clay! Clay is so super-focused that sometimes they just can't take it: training, training, maintenance, the Knights' Code tests then…more training. Even Merlok 2.0 is exhausted and he has no physical form! So, the Knights send Clay off on a holiday against his will (arranged by Lance because if there's one thing he can do it's plan a vacation.) But unbeknownst to the other Knights, Jestro and the Book of Monsters are tracking an evil book. A book that they suspect is located near the resort “Exalted Towers” renowned for its exquisite service, where Clay is staying. It's the BOOK OF CRUELTY and Clay notices that it's affecting the “high class” resort where Lance has booked him: the service is terrible, the staff is nasty, and everyone seems to take joy in being cruel to him (and to each other.) Meanwhile, the other Knights are having a terrible time because they realize that Clay takes charge of the basic maintenance of almost everything in the Fortrex. Stuff starts breaking down, chores are not getting done and everyone is getting on each other's nerves. Clay senses things are “off” at the resort, and discovers the book they've been using as the guest register is really the Book of Cruelty. As Clay scoops it up, he looks outside to see…Jestro and his monsters arrive on the Evilmobile. Clay battles as best he can on his own by setting traps and being cunning but he's finally caught. Just when it looks like this will be the cruelest vacation ever the other Knights arrive on their vehicles! They spring into action, free Clay, and battle and defeat Jestro and the monsters – though Jestro escapes. The Knights make Clay promise to never go on vacation again.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: When outlaws chase a sheriff out of a western town, Sonic takes over. But the outlaws are robots built by Robotnik. And when they capture a pretty possum of a saloon girl, Sonic meets Robotnik for a showdown.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.sub-title: Super Special Sonic Search and Smash Squad
programme.desc: Sonic outsmarts Coconuts, then stumbles into a Convention of Bounty Hunter Robots where Robotnik puts a price on his head. After Sonic defeats all the Robot Bounty Hunters, Robotnik creates Scratch and Grounder to be his S.S.S.S.S. Squad.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: In order to free Sketch Lampoon (a satirical comic book artist) from Robotnik's new high security prison, Sonic allows himself to be captured, then makes a high speed rescue and escape.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: When Wes Weasley returns to the Fortress, Coconuts tricks Robotnik into signing an IOU so he can buy thousands of Mobiums worth of magic tricks to use on Sonic. In the end, Sonic goes free, and Robotnik is forced to pay Wes the massive IOU debt.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: When Sally uncovers Robotnik's plan to seed the cloud with toxic rain, they attempt a daring mission to sabotage the dirigible-like craft being transported by land vehicles. Mission fails when Sally, Bunnie and Antoine are captured.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: After Dulcy exhibits strange behavior, Sally discovers she's going through a "rites of passage" stage of her adolescence. In Dragon tradition, she is drawn to Dragon Lair, a migratory nesting ground, through trance-like visits from her mother.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: In Part II, Sonic and Sally steal the Roboti-sizer plans, stop the Destroyer from polluting the Great Forest and save Little Sonic, Little Sally and Dulcy's mother, Sabina.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: On a mission to contact the first Freedom Fighters on the King's List, Sonic and the others are forced to travel through a tunnel which carries a "curse" against all intruders.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Tails brings a new friend home to Knothole - a baby Terra-Pod who has strayed from the herd that is currently migrating. Sonic, Sally, and some of the other Freedom Fighters return the Baby-T to its mom and the rest of the herd.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: While on a mission to the big city to replace Nicole's malfunctioning microchip, Sonic and Sally encounter the Guardian, a mysterious cloaked figure who guards a dormant wizard named Lazar and his computer of evil spells.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic and The Freedom Fighters journey to Robotnik's underground air base in a mission to reprogram the launch data on Robotnik's fleet of Stealth-Bot aircraft. While attempting to reprogram the Stealth-Bot computer system.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: The Freedom Fighters, with new addition, Dulcy, develop a De-Roboti-sizer and try it out on Bunnie. It's a success and, against Sally's wishes, Sonic battles Robotnik's newest weapon, a Virtual Reality Shriek-Bot.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: A homecoming is interrupted for Sonic, Sonia and Manic when Sleet and Dingo arrive to collect back taxes after returning to their birthplace.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: The Shane Gang find themselves competing in the Slugball Championship - a rough and tumble cross between hockey, slugslinging and rugby - with deadly random obstacles thrown in for fun! Eli suspects the rival team is cheating, but he's going to have to prove it first... that is if he can survive the game!

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Locke and Lode have run roughshod over a cavern and The Shane Gang aim to kick them out. But the townspeople have their own hero to clean up the town - none other than the King of Sling, a pompous Slugslinger the gang has bested on a number of occasions. There is no way he'll survive against two of Blakk's minions, but Eli can't intervene without humiliating the king! So the Shane Gang decide to work behind the scenes to make the king victorious. That is until Dr. Blakk himself arrives.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: The Shane Gang's been captured by the zombifying Mr. Saturday! Locked up in Stalagmite 17, they are helpless as Dr. Blakk begins the trip there to collect them. Only one hope remains... the two members of the Shane Gang Saturday didn't capture: Pronto and Burpy. Can this mismatched pair pull off an impressive prison break?

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Our heroes are lured into an elaborate game by a twisted villain calling himself the Game Master. The Shane Gang must use every bit of skill they have to pass each level, but there is a devious twist: every slug they fire is captured, with the promise that they'll see them again only if they manage to make it to the end. That's becoming all the more difficult with fewer and fewer slugs.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Burpy is sick, and the only thing that will cure him is a trip to the Lightwell - a mysterious, hidden power source only slugs (and the Shadow Clan) know the way to. Burpy can't make it on his own, so Eli vows to take him there. He convinces the Shadow Clan to point the way, but the journey is fraught with peril. Meanwhile the rest of the Shane Gang must fight side by side with the Shadow Clan when Blakk's minions attack.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: A mysterious creature is draining the energy from all the slugs in a distant cavern, and the residents are offering a rich reward to whoever can stop it. Mercenaries come out of the woodwork hoping for the prize, but the Shane Gang aim to stop it for free. That's what they do. It turns out this creature is more dangerous than anyone could imagine, and one by one, the hunters are taken out of the game-leaving only Eli and the reviled STOCKER remaining.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: While the rest of the Shane Gang defend the perimeter from the legions of Blakk Guards sent to free Dr. Blakk from prison, Eli interogates the captured villain. Surprisingly, Blakk feels like talking. He reveals where he came from, how and why he discovered ghouls and most importantly of all, Eli learns the truth about what happened to his father.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Eli's got a new slug recruit! But in the heat of battle, can this rookie go from frightened novice to the hero of the day?

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Dr. Blakk and his Darkbane minions have discovered a way to make their ghouls faster and stronger - giving them an edge over the Shane Gang. In order to even the odds, Eli is going to need his most powerful slugs and an upgraded blaster from Redhook. The only problem is, Dr. Blakk already has the slingersmith working for him... Eli and the gang attempt a daring rescue mission to free Redhook, but along the way discover Blakk has a much more sinister plan in the works.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Dr. Blakk has succeeded in creating a gap in the magical slug-energy barrier that protects Slugterra, opening the way for the evil Darkbane to tunnel their way up from the Deep Caverns. Eli and the Shane gang must stop this at any cost. Now armed with a selection of upgraded slugs, blasters and armor, they take the battle to Dr. Blakk's front door. While his team slugs it out against Dr. Blakk's minions, Eli takes on Blakk himself once and for all!

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: The Dark Slinger and his marauders have invaded Slugterra! But there's more to this new threat than meets the eye. Eli must fight a very different kind of duel to save Slugterra...and himself.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: A new member joins the Shane Gang! His name is Junjie, and he is a master of the mysterious slugslinging art of Slug Fu. But even with the power of five slingers, the Shane Gang find themselves in over their heads trying to protect the ancient Elemental Slugs.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: The Shane Gang and Junjie race across the 99 caverns to keep the Elemental Slugs out of the hands of the Goon.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: To master the mysterious slug-slinging art of Slug Fu, Eli must train alone with Junjie. That means leaving behind the rest of the Shane Gang-as well as all of Eli's slugs, and the ultra-powerful Elementals! Pronto vows to keep the Elementals safe, but proves so annoying that they run-er, hop-away!

programme.title: Toys and Colors
programme.desc: Toys and Colors teaches kids life skills, letters, numbers, and more – all in a fun and family-friendly way!

programme.title: Ryan's World
programme.desc: Ryan is back in Roblox with the Ryan's World crew, escaping submarines, bad guys and even the Wild West!

programme.title: Jason Vlogs
programme.desc: Jason and Alex hit the road! The brothers visit a kids museum, the zoo, get their eyesight checked and more.

programme.title: Ryan's World
programme.desc: Fun runs in the family! Ryan and Mommy play classic kids' games, challenges, and make a little playtime magic.

programme.title: Ryan's World
programme.desc: School's in session in Ryan's World, and Ryan can't wait! Tag along for wacky classroom challenges and games.

programme.title: Jason Vlogs
programme.desc: Pull on your knee pads! Jason and Alex learn the importance of safety, plus even more fun lessons for kids.

programme.title: Ryan's World
programme.desc: Ryan shows off his box fort know-how with his DIY box fort vending machine, an arcade box fort maze and more!

programme.title: Kids Diana Show | Mermaid Magic!
programme.desc: Join Diana and Roma for a magical mermaid tale in a series of maritime adventures!

programme.title: Challenge Squad | IRL Games!
programme.desc: Challenge Squad takes on the most epic challenges, featuring your favorite YouTube stars!

programme.title: KidCity | Challenge Mania!
programme.desc: Play along with the KidCity family —Little Flash, Ava, DadCity, and MomCity— in all their kid-friendly games!

programme.title: Ryan's World Specials | Retro Ryan!
programme.desc: Discover how fun learning can be with YouTube superstar, Ryan, and all of his Ryan's World friends!

programme.title: Ryan's World Specials | Craftacular
programme.desc: Discover how fun learning can be with YouTube superstar, Ryan, and all of his Ryan's World friends!

programme.title: LankyBox | Ultimate mishmash Vol 3
programme.desc: LankyBox is Roblox superstars Justin and Adam, two best friends who love playing popular video games!

programme.title: HobbyKidsTV | HobbySpace Explorers!
programme.desc: Come along for the fun with popular YouTube family, HobbyKidsTV! Plus, HobbyKids Adventures!

programme.title: Talking Tom and Friends
programme.desc: Things get even more epic in Season 3 as Talking Tom and Friends try new ways to make their dreams come true, making more friends (and enemies) along the way!

programme.title: Fishtronaut
programme.desc: The series tells the story of Fishtronaut, a fish in a spacesuit, similar to reverse scuba gear, which allows him to fly and breathe out of water.

programme.title: Sparkle Power
programme.desc: Power through the day with some sparkle and shine!

programme.title: Ollie! The Boy Who Became What He Ate
programme.desc: Ollie is a 6-year-old with a massive imagination, often lost in his own world - flipping, sliding, climbing and rocket-blasting through the house, practicing at being the master of all things. But even masters need to stop and refuel. When meals or snack time interrupt Ollie's play, he finds himself confronted with the real challenge of childhood trying new food. To escape his predicament, Ollie uses his magic spoon to transport himself, along with his sister Poppy, and her stuffy Nummy, to a food planet filled with adventure and the very food Ollie stuck his spoon into.

programme.title: Pirate school
programme.desc: On a small remote island surrounded by endless seas, a special Pirate School was opened, where children from pirate families study. Among them are Keel, Fuse and Bobo. The pirate origin does not relieve them from study and normal school duties.

programme.title: The Fixies
programme.desc: The Fixies follows the comical misadventures of Tom Thomas and his secret friendship with Simka and Nolik, the children of the Fixie family that lives in his apartment. There's just no end to the troubles Tom Thomas and his Fixie friends get themselves into with all the gadgets and appliances around them!

programme.title: The Pirates Next Door
programme.desc: A small town's quiet life is suddenly turned upside down by the arrival of a family of pirates! For Matilda, her new neighbors are a dream come true! With Jim Lad, the Jolley-Rogers' son, around, there's no chance of getting bored.

programme.title: Shaun the Sheep
programme.desc: It's countryside chaos as Shaun The Sheep returns to the small screen with his very own series. Peace in the valley turns to mayhem in the meadow as Shaun leads his flock into all sorts of scrapes and scraps, running rings around sheepdog Bitzer when the Farmer's back is turned.

programme.title: Future Card Buddyfight
programme.desc: It is the year 2030, and the stage is the capital of Japan, Chou-Tokyo. Through "Buddyfight", humans have started cultural interactions with residents from other worlds called "Affinity Dimensions". Buddyfight is a game with selected humans as the "Buddyfighter", and residents from the other world as the partner (known as "Buddy Monster"). These battles have high significance and sometimes it is even used to decide the fate of a nation, and naturally there are those who seek to use the Buddy Monsters for evil purposes.

programme.title: Hogie the Globehopper
programme.desc: Hogie the Globehopper is a fun tv show that will inspire a curiosity and fascination about the world and its people. Hogie and his friends Lorna, Bernie and Floaty travel the world, making lots of friends along the way.

programme.title: I'll Get You! Holiday
programme.desc: The action takes place in all year round resort, where Wolf doesn't chase Hare to eat him anymore: now it's all about sports and competition. However, in his crazy chase after recognition and victories the grey hooligan often uses methods that aren't really fair, which provokes awkward and funny situations.

programme.title: Hero HQ
programme.desc: Your favorite superhero shows teaming up in one action-packed block that includes: “Pincode”, “Talking Tom Heroes” and “Pumpkin Reports".

programme.title: The Adventures of Bernie: The Giant Seaweed | The Fish Tamer | The Fan Battle
programme.desc: Bernie sees Barbara gardening, and is inspired to try and grow a plant that he can climb all the way up to the surface on, to be reunited with Zig! But the plant takes forever to grow.

programme.title: Luna Chip & Inkie Adventure Rangers Go: Let's Rock
programme.desc: Rock collectors, Chip and Little Bigfoot, are on the hunt for a special, purple stone and Luna knows just where to find it. Before they set off, Inkie notices a tiny tear in the beaver's backpack. Better fix that hole before it gets bigger, Chip! But the beaver waves off her concern. He'll fix the little hole later. But as the group hikes, stops to enjoy the view, or chip off a piece of another cool rock, the hole grows bigger and bigger. All of Chip's adventure gear falls out along the path behind an oblivious Chip. Looks like that tiny problem just got really big!

programme.title: Hip Hop Harry Music Videos: ABC Song / Earth Day / Easter Egg Hunt / Go For It! / Go Go Go Who's Next Dance Circles
programme.desc: Listen to this awesome ABC rap from Hip Hop Harry! He'll teach you all about the letters of the alphabet in this awesome hip hop song. / Hip Hop Harry is going to take you on a tour of the planet Earth and show you some of the most beautiful parts of it. From lush forests to deep blue oceans to the animals we share this world with--there is much worth protecting! / Enjoy this original kids rap music video from Hip Hop Harry all about how much fun it is to go on an Easter egg hunt with your friends and family! An Easter egg hunt is when you, your parents, and the Easter Bunny hide eggs around various places outside and you go and look for them. They are a ton of fun! This video will also go over how to paint an Easter egg, where the best places are to have an Easter egg hunt (such as your backyard, a friend's house, or at school) and how these activities are a great way for families to spend time together! / Check out this awesome dance video from Hip Hop Harry all about following your dreams and going for it, no matter how far away they may seem!This is a brand new rap version of "Go Go Go Who's Next?" is accompanied by an awesome dance routine featuring Hip Hop Harry and a crew of amazing b-boy breakdancers. This video is inspirational and fun for kids of all ages.Try to follow along with the dance moves at home or make up your own dance moves! / Dance along with Hip Hop Harry and the whole Hip Hop Central crew in this collection of dance circles. Hip Hop Harry's infectious "Go, Go, Go" song will have you on your feet and moving to the beat in no time!

programme.title: Car City Super: Super Truck: Fire Truck Stops the Slime Attack
programme.desc: Some bad guy is shooting slime all over the city. Super Truck tries to clean it by turning into a Firetruck. But to clear everything up AND stop the bad guy he's going to have to team up with Frank too!

programme.title: Carl's Car Wash: Fran's Fruit Truck / Sparky's Spaceship
programme.desc: Fran is pushing a cart full of fruit salad into her truck when the cart flips over and the salad spills all over her delivery truck! It's off to Carl's Car Wash! At the car wash, Carl inspects her vehicle and decides she's a little messy and her wash only requires 3 tokens. Fran heads into the car wash and drives out as shiny as the apple she hands Carl! / Sparky the alien is on his way to Quasar's Market when he takes a joyride through the goopy rings around Saturn. Unfortunately, the rings get space goo all over his spaceship, so Sparky zoogles Carl on the intergalactic web and zooms right down. After Carl's mess assessment, Sparky pays two tokens and gets all spic and span. Sparky is ecstatic that Carl cleaned up this out-of-this-world mess!

programme.title: Vida the Vet
programme.desc: When Sunny the Mouse has trouble sleeping in the clinic's recovery room, Vida gathers all the comforts of home to help him finally get some z's.

programme.title: Vida the Vet
programme.desc: When Popcorn plays on his hamster wheel all night, he's very sleepy the next day...and cranky too! But will he take a nap?

programme.title: Mittens & Pants: The Big Roll, Portrait of a Puppy, Forgittin' Kittin
programme.desc: Mittens and Turnip hear tales of a mysterious ball that is haunting Kibble Corners.They go on the hunt to find out what it is. Pants' parents try to get Pants to sit still for a photo. But the energetic, wiggly puppy just won't sit still long enough for a good picture. Mittens doesn't listen to where she should meet her parents after she plays with Pants. Pants helps her track down where they went.

programme.title: Super Supremes: Old MacDonald Had A Farm / Exercise Song / The Supremes Finger Family / Mama May I Songs For Kids / Colors Of The Rainbow

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.sub-title: Steve Hofstetter: A Trip to Japan
programme.desc: Often called the "hardest working man in show-business", Steve Hofstetter covers everything from paper decapitations in plane crashes to seeing-eye children.

programme.title: Chad Thornsberry
programme.desc: Chad Thornsberry was born in St. Louis, MO. From an early age he learned his family was blessed, and blessed him with humor, quick wit, and a love of storytelling. Chad's unique comedic perspective awards audience the opportunity to laugh at the common occurrences in everyday life. Often referred to as a great writer, his straightforward style allows audiences to laugh with him and at him as they find the humor in themselves. With reflections on growing up in a trailer park and observations as an English teacher, Chad's satiric insights look at the pitfalls that make us human. With smart humor and a conversational style, Chad has delighted audiences from the trailer park, throughout the Midwest, and from coast to coast.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.sub-title: Chris Schlichting: Catch and Dress a Squirrel
programme.desc: Chris Schlichting, an Iowan with every bone in his body still intact, comes with a few crucial warnings. Beware of birthday wishes, day raccoons, and the spelling on all hand written love letters.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: San Diego native Jesse Egan jokes about hitting on women in a smart car, hippie drive-bys, and the gluten free craze.

programme.title: Andy Beningo
programme.desc: Over the past decade, Andy Beningo has established himself as one of the hardest working comedians in the business. Performing his clever, "every man" material has led to some 2,700 career performances. Along the way, he has appeared on AXS Gotham Comedy Live, as a final four finalist on CMT's Next Big Comic, and on the Bob and Tom radio show. Beningo's new CD regularly plays on Laugh USA on XM Sirius Radio. He's been hailed for his clean comedy, and was named one of the 40 Best Up and Coming Comedians in the country. He was also named "Best Comedian" by both the Detroit Metro Times and Detroit Hour magazine.

programme.title: James Johann
programme.desc: James' childhood upbringing was significantly influenced by country music, countless bad hair cuts, and Catholic school. In 1991, James began his stand-up career in Kansas City. Today, James is a long-time veteran of the stand-up comedy circuit, performing at clubs across the country. His self-deprecating sense of humor and high energy style come together to create a unique onstage persona. James relies more on his brain than the profane and his comedy is a truthful and hilarious reflection of life as he sees it.

programme.title: Collin Moulton
programme.desc: Collin is one of the most fun, personable, and sought after headliners today. He has had his own stand-up special on SHOWTIME, he's been on NICKELODEON, and was recently featured on LAST CALL WITH CARSON DALY. Touring for over 15 years Collin has gained an ease and enjoyment on stage that makes every show worth watching.America knows and loves him. His familiarity and energy engages and relieves the audience before he even speaks. His electric storytelling style makes you care about every topic he explores. Collin's comedy is the release needed from our every day lives. Come needing to laugh tonight, leave wanting to laugh forever!Collin Moulton

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Chris Voth is an accomplished comedian, a licensed teacher, and a published author. Voth made his debut late-night television appearance on the Late Late Show with Craig Ferguson. He also appeared in three seasons of NBC's Last Comic Standing and was chosen for the prestigious Great American Comedy Festival. A 15-year comedy veteran, Voth is a past winner of the Denver Comedy Works Competition and has worked with everyone from Dave Chappelle to Larry the Cable Guy to Linda Ronstadt. Voth's first comedy CD titled "Never Mind the Jim J Bullocks, Here's the Chris Voth" is currently available for purchase. Chris currently balances his performance schedule with his full-time high-school teaching career. You can read his short story, "Stand Up and Deliver," published in the Cream City Review Literary Journal. In it, Chris shares the experiences he had when entering the teaching field after years in stand-up comedy.

programme.title: Dwight Slade
programme.desc: Part man, part ageless boy comedian Dwight Slade has the privilege of being a comedy legend in American stand up. The winner of this year's Boston Comedy Festival, Slade combines an intelligent, raging voice of justice with the snickering attitude of a high school prankster. He gives the impression of a man on a journey. Who enjoys nothing more than making fun of everything along the way. Born in Seattle, Dwight moved often in his early years, living in San Mateo, California Wilton, Connecticut Marietta, Georgia and Houston, Texas.

programme.title: Gallagher An Uncensored Evening
programme.desc: Join Gallagher for his 1st TV special from 1980, complete with candy bar treats and a Sledge-O-Matic routine for which the audience was ill prepared.

programme.title: Jasmine Ellis: Nobody's Queen
programme.desc: Jasmine Ellis shares her unapologetically hilarious takes on being a newly married millennial.

programme.title: Jay Stevens: Life Is Hilarious
programme.desc: Growing up, Jay Stevens was known as a hilarious outgoing character by friends, family, colleagues and those he would meet on a first encounter.

programme.title: Nikki Carr: I Wish These Were Jokes
programme.desc: Nikki Carr is 57 and feeling great. After all, she's got the career where all you have to do is be yourself and have a good time.

programme.title: Tim Wilkins: Password Protected
programme.desc: Tim is a 20-year veteran stand-up comedian, TV and radio personality, speaker and writer, who has performed on stages around the world.

programme.title: Bone Hampton: It Is What It Is
programme.desc: As down home as collards and cornbread, and as funny as a possum in a petticoat, Bone Hampton is a master at making audiences feel like family.

programme.title: Kendra Cunningham: On My Best Behavior
programme.desc: Kendra Cunningham has been named as a comic to watch by Time Out New York and has been compared to Groucho Marx and Mae West by the UK's Chortle.

programme.title: Nancy Norton: Super Dork
programme.desc: Norton is known for delivering engaging, high energy, face-paced performances.

programme.title: Robert Mac: Back to Late Titicaca
programme.desc: Robert Mac returns to the Dry Bar stage with less smartness, less subtleness, and even more silliness.

programme.title: Josh Sneed: Live in the Dessert
programme.desc: Being funny 24/7 can be difficult, but Josh Sneed does it.

programme.title: Mark Evans: Southern, Not Stupid
programme.desc: Mark is here to relay the stupidity of the human race.

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.desc: The stars of MST3K bring their comedic riffing treatment to Dinosaurus, a vintage 60s monster flick, complete with a caveman and drunk-looking stop motion dinosaurs. Travel back in time with Mike, Kevin, and Bill for Dinosaurus!

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.desc: Bela Lugosi! An ugly robot! The power of invisibility! A military intelligence officer romancing an ambitious reporter! All of these exciting-sounding elements are undeniably contained within the runtime of The Phantom Creeps! This feature is a parody and contains the original movie combined with a comedic commentary by Mike, Kevin and Bill from RiffTrax (formerly of MST3K).

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.desc: The stars of Mystery Science Theater 3000 bring their comedic riffing treatment to this driving scare film. Join Mike, Kevin, and Bill for Borrowed Power!

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.desc: The stars of MST3K bring their comedic riffing treatment to this budget version of The Wizard of Oz! Join Mike, Kevin, Bill, and surprise guest Dr Erotico for The Wonderful Land of Oz!

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.sub-title: Presents: Sherlock Holmes and the Woman in Green
programme.desc: Temptress of Pleasure or Mistress of Murder? Bridget and Mary Jo investigate as they riff Sherlock Holmes and The Woman in Green! This feature is a parody and contains the original movie combined with a comedic commentary by Bridget and Mary Jo from RiffTrax (formerly of Mystery Science Theater 3000).

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.sub-title: Shorts: You Can Do Something About Acne
programme.desc: The stars of MST3K bring their comedic riffing treatment to this short about pizza faced youths. Join Mike, Kevin, and Bill as they learn that You Can Do Something About Acne!

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.desc: The stars of MST3K bring their comedic riffing treatment this cheesy action classic! It's Die Hard on Skis starring the legendary Bruce Campbell! Join Mike, Kevin and Bill for Icebreaker!

Soon, heartbreak becomes the least of David's worries.

programme.title: Stonewall (2015)
programme.desc: Passions and politics make a volatile mix in this dynamic drama directed by Roland Emmerich that follows the events that led to the birth of the modern Gay Rights movement.

Festival favorite of Venice, Toronto, and Sundance.

programme.desc: After her husband's death, Autumn sells her ranch to Jake expecting nothing will change however, Jake has ulterior motives with the land and her heart.

programme.desc: On opposite sides of a development project, Olivia and Brian are surprised to find they are the Maid of Honor and Best Man at the same wedding. They have to put their feelings aside to save their best friends' wedding - which may turn out to be their own as well.

programme.title: How to Find Forever
programme.desc: Marley is brilliant at organizing other people's engagements. When designing her most important proposal yet, will the man who could jeopardize it all be her very own prince charming?

programme.title: Sparks Over Brooklyn
programme.desc: Single mom and chef Lilah sees her dreams for the future fall apart when tech innovator Charlie buys her beloved family restaurant. As they work together on different visions, sparks fly between them.

programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. Detective Mike Logan takes on a special undercover assignment as a nanny.

programme.title: How to Be a Latin Lover
programme.desc: A man who made a career of seducing rich older women must move in with his estranged sister.

programme.title: The Brothers Bloom
programme.desc: Stephen and his brother Bloom work one last job conning a beautiful young heiress out of her cash.

programme.title: ParaNorman
programme.desc: Norman Babcock finds his paranormal abilities pushed to their limits to take on zombies and ghosts, and save his town from a centuries-old curse.

programme.title: The Boxtrolls
programme.desc: When evil Archibald Snatcher decides to capture the Boxtrolls – lovable, box-wearing creatures – it's up to Eggs and his friend Winnie to same them.

programme.title: Kubo And The Two Strings
programme.desc: When he accidentally summons an evil spirit, Kubo must recover his fallen samurai father's mystical weaponry and discover his own magical powers.

programme.title: The Time Machine
programme.desc: Hoping to alter the events of the past, a 19th-century inventor instead travels 800,000 years into the future, where he finds humankind divided into two warring races.

programme.title: An Unfinished Life
programme.desc: Jean moves in with her father in-law. Through time, they learn to forgive each other and heal old wounds.

programme.title: Allied
programme.desc: A Canadian intelligence officer in North Africa encounters a French Resistance fighter on a deadly mission

programme.title: The Kite Runner
programme.desc: After spending years in California, Amir returns to his homeland in Afghanistan.

programme.title: The Aviator
programme.desc: The early years of American figure Howard Hughes is captured by legendary director Martin Scorsese

programme.title: Baby Blue Marine
programme.desc: A marine, living under a false identity, becomes a true hero by performing acts of bravery.

programme.title: Courage And The Passion
programme.desc: The story of test pilots, the women in their lives and the anxieties of personnel at an air force testing facility.

programme.title: Every Time We Say Goodbye
programme.desc: Set during WW II, a young couple struggles when the girl's parents refuse to let her marry the man she loves.

programme.title: Immediate Family
programme.desc: A married, childless couple decide to adopt from a pregnant teenage girl, who later gets second thoughts.

programme.title: Our Man In Havana
programme.desc: A vacuum cleaner salesman is recruited by the British secret service to act as a spy in Havana.

programme.title: It Had To Be You
programme.desc: Ginger Rogers stars in this fanciful, screwball comedy as a young woman who has left three grooms standing at the altar...and is about to do it again! Cornel Wilde co-stars as the gentleman who tempts her away from the altar and then succeeds in marrying her himself.

programme.title: A Night To Remember
programme.desc: Mystery writer Jeff Troy (Brian Aherne) and his lovely wife Nancy (Loretta Young) move into a Greenwich Village basement apartment in order to gather material for Jeff's new book.

programme.title: The Trouble With Angels
programme.desc: A pair of young troublemakers is assigned to a convent school. Try as she may, the Reverend Mother is unable to stop the two from wreaking havoc on the place.

programme.title: That Touch of Mink
programme.desc: Love arrives with a splash when a handsome and eligible tycoon and a beautiful working woman meet over a curbside mud puddle. He's enchanted by her small town ways, she's captivated by his romantic, debonair manner.

programme.title: Sunset Boulevard
programme.desc: Intense, enthralling, and unforgettable, Sunset Boulevard stars Gloria Swanson as Norma Desmond, a faded silent-movie star, and William Holden as Joe Gillis, a down-on-his-luck screenwriter whom she enlists to help her make her triumphant return.

programme.title: Paradise, Hawaiian Style
programme.desc: Elvis takes to the skies over the island paradise of Kauai. He's a partner in a helicopter charter service. Romance, naturally, is in the air for the King…but his business may be grounded.

programme.title: Easy Come, Easy Go
programme.desc: On his last day in the Navy, frogman Elvis discovers a sunken treasure ship. On his first day as a civilian, Elvis starts his new job—self-employed treasure hunter!

channel.display-name: Movies on the Rotten Tomatoes Channel

programme.title: Trailers Reloaded
programme.desc: A look back at cinema's finest summer getaways.

programme.title: Trailer Trivia
programme.desc: Celebrate PRIDE by checking out these fun facts from our favorite LGBTQ+ tv shows.

programme.title: RT Essentials
programme.desc: We breakdown the movies that had the largest divide between critics and the audience.

programme.title: Come September
programme.desc: A New York businessman visits his Italian villa to relax with his girlfriend, but his home has become a hotel.

programme.title: Streets of Fire
programme.desc: Get ready for a rock ‘n' roll fable about a kidnapped diva and a handsome loner in this sexy, gritty thriller.

programme.title: Shanghai Express
programme.desc: Train passengers traveling through China encounter trouble in the form of a Chinese rebel and his followers.

programme.title: 10e
programme.desc: After a 17-year old girl's reputation takes a hit at school before the prom, her single father tries to rebuild their relationship by acting as more of a friend, when what she really needs is a father.

programme.title: Almost Friends
programme.desc: Once a promising chef, now unmotivated and living at home with mom, Charlie gets by as a movie theatre assistant manager. But when he meets his dream girl and his estranged father returns, will he finally be able to find a path forward

programme.title: Sweetness In The Belly
programme.desc: A moving story of Lilly, a child abandoned in Africa. Forced to flee ethiopia for england when civil war breaks, she befriends Amina, an ethiopian refugee who has fled the same war. They begin a mission to reunite people with their families.

programme.title: Babysplitters
programme.desc: When two couples with mixed feelings about having kids hatch a plan to conceive and share one baby between them, it seems like they may have found the perfect compromise. Starring Danny Pudi, emily Chang, eddie Alfano and Maiara Walsh.

programme.title: May the Best Wedding Win
programme.desc: Tiffany and her frenemy compete over wedding bookings, despite her not having a real fiancé.

programme.title: For the Love of Lily
programme.desc: A career-minded city girl must build a garden with a plant-loving country boy to appease her boss.

programme.title: Love on Retreat
programme.desc: Sparks fly between Jenny and Nate at a corporate retreat, despite him being her boss's brother.

programme.title: Just for Showmance
programme.desc: Tara marries Joe, a stranger as part of a TV show, but soon starts to fall for him after all.

programme.title: A Christmas Hero
programme.desc: When a young disillusioned war vet home from Afghanistan sees nothing good in his life, a visit by his guardian angel shows him that his life really did make a difference.

programme.title: Hats Off To Christmas!
programme.desc: After ten years, Mia hopes for a promotion to upper management in the store when the boss/owner wants to see her. But he wants her to show his son, Nick, the ropes. Mia's a widowed mom and Nick is single.

programme.title: Lily Dale
programme.desc: Set in the year 1910, Lily Dale presents the portrait of a family in turmoil when, after a long absence, young Horace Robedaux (Tim Guinee) reunites with his mother, Corella (Stockard Channing) and his sister, Lily Dale (Mary Stuart Masterson).

programme.title: The Book Of Love
programme.desc: To fulfill his promise made to his late wife, an introverted architect helps an independent teenage girl to build a raft that can sail across the ocean. They embark on an incredible adventure.

programme.title: Detective K: Secret of the lost island
programme.desc: In 1795, fake silver floods the economy. Kim Min investigates the criminal ring behind the perilous scheme.

programme.title: Blue Swallow
programme.desc: Kyung-won has been dreaming of becoming a pilot. All she wants to do is flying back home with her plane.

programme.title: Welcome To The Guesthouse
programme.desc: Jun-geun keeps failing at job seeking in cold job market. One day, He finds hope through surfing by the beach.

programme.title: Rebound
programme.desc: The miracle of a new coach and 6 unheralded players. When everyone says it's impossible, we grab the rebound!

programme.title: Dollhouse
programme.desc: Ella ends up encountering a strange man that is infatuated with young black women, while on the job. The man happens to be the infamous Dollhouse Killer, who turns his victims into perfect dolls for his pleasure.

programme.title: Domestic Warfare
programme.desc: When a generational curse catches up to Sisley, she must try to overcome all the obstacles throughout her life and learn to forgive or suffer mentally for all eternity.

programme.title: Her Leather Coat
programme.desc: All family secrets have a price, and a due date, for this family of estranged sisters, the date is now.

programme.title: Homewrecker
programme.desc: Married couple, Sam and Darlene, decide to rent out their extra room in their house to Eva, a friendly young woman. Suddenly people start to die and adultery starts to happen. Will Sam and Darlene survive the "Homewreckening"?

programme.title: Concrete Canyons
programme.desc: In this thrilling crime drama, a sheriff searches for his son who is accused of murder and on the run from the law.

programme.title: The Miseducation of Cameron Post
programme.desc: In 1993 after teenage Cameron is caught in the backseat of a car with the prom queen, she is sent away to a treatment center in a remote area called God's Promise. While she is being subjected to questionable gay conversion therapies, she bonds with some fellow residents as they pretend to go along with the process while waiting to be released.

programme.title: Eye See You
programme.desc: Recovering from the psychological effects of witnessing a brutal crime, FBI Agent Jake Malloy (Sylvester Stallone) checks into a rehabilitation clinic for law enforcement officers in the remote wilderness of Wyoming during the dead of winter. He soon finds himself helping other patients as a serial killer begins killing them one by one.

programme.title: The Long Walk Home
programme.desc: Odessa Carter (Whoopi Goldberg) needs to get to work as a nanny in the home of the affluent Miriam Thompson (Sissy Spacek), but she refuses to take the bus. Odessa is participating in the Montgomery bus boycott, protesting against the inequality between blacks and whites, so Miriam decides to offer Odessa a ride to work every day. Though the community and Miriam's husband (Dwight Schultz) insist she not get involved, the relationship between Miriam and Odessa has already changed for the better.

programme.title: Earthstorm
programme.desc: After a massive asteroid crashes into the moon, it's discovered that the moon's structure is now entirely unstable, threatening all life on Earth.

programme.title: Streets of Blood
programme.desc: While investigating the "accidental" death of his partner, a New Orleans police officer plunges into the city's criminal underworld. Starring Val Kilmer ("The Doors") and 50 Cent.

programme.title: El Talismán

programme.title: Eva Luna
programme.desc: Eva Luna - Marcela Confiesa: Marcela, le confiesa a Victoria, que fue ella quien planeó su intento de suicidio. Julio escucha esta conversación y decide enfrentarse a Marcela.

programme.title: La Clínica
programme.desc: La Clínica - Gemela: En la Clínica descubren que se ha colado la gemela de Maripili, ese evento desata el nerviosismo en Lucy

programme.title: Secretos de Villanas
programme.desc: Secretos de Villanas - S02E02 - Las Verdades en la Cara: Las Villanas van al lago a practicar flyboard. Por la tarde, tras las preguntas de Geraldine, Sabine habla sobre la difícil situación que pasó con el padre de sus hijos.

programme.title: Al diablo con los guapos: Relación expuesta
programme.desc: Karla y los demás empleados descubren a Damián en el cuarto de Braulio. Alejandro desconoce a Luciana como su madre. Constancio se rehúsa a decir la verdad a pesar de ver el cuadro de Rosario y Mili.

programme.title: Vino el amor: Sacrificio
programme.desc: David se entera de que Perla fue asesinada y no puede evitar pensar en que Juan tuvo algo que ver. Por otro lado, Miguel le pide una oportunidad a Luciana para demostrarle todo su amor.

programme.title: Amor real
programme.desc: Remigio le propone a Adolfo matar a Manuel a cambio de su libertad. Matilde va a hablar con Remigio para que le explique el motivo del arresto de su administrador. Prudencia le dice que es una insensata por ponerse en evidencia.

programme.title: Corazón indomable: Las sospechas de Santa
programme.desc: Santa sospecha que fue José Antonio el que ayudó a Octavio a llevarse a Lupita Miguel se sorprende al ver que Simona está perdiendo la cordura Maricruz les dice a todos que va a pelear por su hija y buscará a Octavio para arreglar la situación.

programme.title: Destilando amor: Pasión desenfrenada
programme.desc: Hilario le dice a Sanjuana que su relación no funcionará y se despide de ella para siempre. Francisco busca a Isadora para pasar una noche apasionada con ella.

programme.title: Teresa: Traición
programme.desc: Teresa lleva a cabo sus planes y besa a Fernando para que quede enamorado de ella. Teresa logra convencer que Arturo y ella se muden al departamento de Fernando.

programme.title: Rubí: Un nuevo empleo
programme.desc: Rubí empieza a coquetearle a Héctor y consigue trabajar con él en el despacho de su padrino, pero él se siente preocupado, porque Rubí es compañera de Luis, un hijo que tiene con otra persona.

programme.title: Fuego en la sangre: Sin rastro
programme.desc: Juan organiza una búsqueda por todo el pueblo para encontrar a su hija, pero la policía llega para detenerlo. Sofía sufre al no tener noticia del paradero de su hija. Rosario escucha a Fernando hablar sobre lo que le hizo a Juan.

programme.title: Marimar Capítulo 52
programme.desc: Renato le pide dinero prestado a Bella, ella acepta prestarle con la condición de que le entregue las escrituras de la hacienda como aval. El gobernador de Valle Encantado le ofrece a Sergio el puesto político que él quiera.

programme.title: María la del Barrio Capítulo 71
programme.desc: Soraya asegura que María es una mala mujer. Soraya teme que el juez descubra que es una mala mujer. Nandito y Alicia declaran en contra de Soraya pero ella lo desmiente todo.

programme.title: María la del Barrio Capítulo 72
programme.desc: Soraya le asegura al juez que es inocente. Soraya queda en libertad, Alicia se pone muy nerviosa ya que tendrá que regresar a vivir con ella. Alicia se niega a regresar a vivir con Soraya. Soraya idea un plan para deshacerse de María.

programme.title: María Mercedes Capítulo 81
programme.desc: María Mercedes sufre al saber que una de sus hijas murió.

programme.title: María Mercedes Capítulo 82
programme.desc: Mística le confiesa a María Mercedes que está embarazada y Jorge Luis es el padre de su hijo.

programme.title: Marimar Capítulo 51
programme.desc: Corazón se encuentra con Sergio y ella no duda en contarle a Marimar. Marimar se entera que la esposa de Renato pronto llegará a Valle Encantado.

programme.title: Marimar Capítulo 52
programme.desc: Renato le pide dinero prestado a Bella, ella acepta prestarle con la condición de que le entregue las escrituras de la hacienda como aval. El gobernador de Valle Encantado le ofrece a Sergio el puesto político que él quiera.

programme.title: María la del Barrio Capítulo 71
programme.desc: Soraya asegura que María es una mala mujer. Soraya teme que el juez descubra que es una mala mujer. Nandito y Alicia declaran en contra de Soraya pero ella lo desmiente todo.

programme.title: Soy tu dueña
programme.desc: Valentina idea un plan para saber el pasado de José Miguel. Sandra sufre al saber que su madre jamás aceptará su relación con Felipe. Isabel decide alejarse de Federico para evitar malentendidos.

programme.title: Alborada
programme.desc: Luis le reclama a Diego por mandarlo matar. Hipólita se entera cuál es el verdadero nombre de Luis. Por su parte, Luis le dice a Esperanza que quiere anular su matrimonio.

programme.title: Alborada
programme.desc: Diego le pide a Juana que le arregle una cita con Hipólita antes de que Luis le gane. Por su parte, Perla va a buscar a Cristóbal para que le ayude a leer una carta pero encuentra a Luis primero y él se da cuenta que es una carta de su familia.

programme.title: Alborada
programme.desc: Luis le advierte a Diego que se mantenga alejado de Hipólita. Luis le dice a Ada que sabe muchas cosas de Hipólita y que sabe de su hijo para ver si ella lo confirma.

programme.title: Alborada
programme.desc: Luis le pregunta a Hipólita si tuvo algún hijo fuera de matrimonio y ella sospecha que es el padre de su hijo. Además, ella decide aceptar la ayuda de Diego.

programme.title: Soy tu dueña
programme.desc: Ivana enfurece al saber que Valentina ha decidido casarse con José Miguel. José Miguel idea un plan para evitar que Valentina piense que se casa con ella solo por interés. Valentina le dice a Benita por qué se enamoró de José Miguel.

programme.title: Soy tu dueña
programme.desc: Felipe le confiesa a Sandra el inmenso amor que siente por ella. Leonor le hace creer a José Miguel que apoya su decisión de casarse con Valentina. Horacio idea un plan para separar a Sandra de Felipe.

programme.title: Imperio de mentiras: Situaciones ocultas
programme.desc: Leonardo llega al funeral de Marcelo y acusa a Eugenio de ser el autor de todos los crímenes. Elisa teme que Leonardo descubra cosas sobre ella y la denuncie.

programme.title: La Gata: Amor prohibido
programme.desc: Pablo le declara todo su amor a Esmeralda y le dice que no podría estar separado de ella. Por otra parte, Lorenza busca a Pablo y le dice que no tendrá una relación con Esmeralda.

programme.title: La que no podía amar: Amor resignado
programme.desc: Rogelio le pide a Ana Paula que se vaya de la hacienda. Macaria le pide a Ulises que le confiese si él siente un interés por Rocío. Ana Paula intenta enamorar de nuevo a Rogelio. Cynthia se molesta con Gustavo, ya que sigue interesado en Ana Paula.

programme.title: Sortilegio: Ayuda por conveniencia
programme.desc: Raquel le pide a Bruno que no ayude a María José a recuperarse. Bruno le dice a Alex que ayudará a María José si le cede la presidencia de la empresa y se divorcia de ella. María José se entera de que Bruno fue quien le donó sangre.

programme.title: Abismo de pasión: Confesión de un crimen
programme.desc: Ingrid confiesa su crimen y jura que no lo hizo a propósito. Carmina le dice a Begoña que Ingrid no se puede casar con Edmundo porque está casada con Gabino.

programme.title: Soy tu dueña: Relación terminada
programme.desc: Ivana le exige a Toledo que se aleje de ella. Toledo idea un plan para reconquistar a Ivana. Leonor cree que Ivana tiene una relación secreta con Toledo. Valentina decide terminar su relación con José Miguel para evitar que Ivana los descubra.

programme.title: La usurpadora: Ayuda externa
programme.desc: Paulina descubre que Paola se encuentra en Acapulco y ha estado disponiendo de su dinero. Estela continúa vigilando a Willy a petición de Estefanía. Paulina le propone a Willy darle un auto nuevo si la ayuda a salvar a Estefanía.

programme.title: El manantial: Amenazas de Justo
programme.desc: Bárbara tiene una conversación con Margarita y le hace una promesa. Justo amenaza a Alfonsina. ¿Qué le pasa a Salvador?

programme.title: Nosotros los guapos: Nueva apariencia
programme.desc: Albertano y Vítor deciden cambiar su apariencia drásticamente para conquistar mujeres, pero optar por volver a su vida normal después de ver que el plan no funciona.

programme.title: María de Todos los Ángeles
programme.desc: María de Todos los Ángeles es una mujer que siente que se está haciendo vieja sin haber encontrado el amor de su vida. Ella tiene un sueño en el que los ángeles anuncian que pronto el amor de su vida va a llegar.

programme.title: María de Todos los Ángeles
programme.desc: María decide provocar un encuentro con Albertano para verlo directamente a los ojos y descubrir si es el amor de su vida. La vida de Albertano corre peligro y María se arriesga para salvarlo.

programme.title: Una familia de diez
programme.desc: Plácido acaba de recordar que es su aniversario de bodas con Renata, por lo que le organizará una cena romántica. Martina invita al cine a la familia a ver el estreno de una película.

programme.title: Una familia de diez
programme.desc: Aldolfo pierde el bono huachicolero por bañarse, y con la ayuda de Jacinta se convierte en hierbero. Carlos recibe regalos de un admirador secreto.

programme.title: La familia P. Luche
programme.desc: Ludovico descubre que no tiene nada de dinero, el banco los va a embargar y Federica habla con ellos y les dice que Ludovico se murió para que cancelen su deuda, pero asistirán al velorio porque es una muerte muy sospechosa.

programme.title: La familia P. Luche
programme.desc: Ludovico no sabe qué regalarle a Federica para su aniversario, se emborracha con Flavio y van a tatuarse los nombres de sus esposas, pero los tatuadores se equivocan y ponen los nombres al revés.

programme.title: 40 y 20
programme.desc: Pedro, el mejor amigo de Paco, está a punto de perder su matrimonio por engañar a su esposa, pero Paco le podría salvar la vida.

programme.title: 40 y 20
programme.desc: Toña se fue de la casa y Brayan Danielle les recomienda a Paco y Fran a su tía, Doña Lucha, para que les ayude con la limpieza.

programme.title: Vecinos
programme.desc: Arturo López pide un préstamo y por una confusión puede retirar cien mil pesos Pao y Ro regresan por su hijo, pero Luis se niega, por lo que querrán que el niño escoja con quien irse.

programme.title: Vecinos
programme.desc: Los vecinos deciden crear un grupo de Whatsapp para asuntos estrictamente vecinales, y como suele ocurrir, el grupo sirve para todo, menos para eso.

programme.title: XHDRBZ
programme.desc: El Lonje Moco se queda dormido presentando sus historias. Julian Tesquenadie presenta el quemador de discos con patos. La licenciada Pamela Juanjo entrevista a Luis Miguel.

programme.title: XHDRBZ
programme.desc: Alz y Heimmer hablan sobre sus amigos del pasado, pero uno de ellos olvida todo. El agente "D Zente" abre un nuevo caso titulado "El asesinato del millonario de la calle Hill".

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: La carta de Miguel deprime a Mía y Gastón aprovecha para acercarse a ella. Lola amenaza a Teo por engañar a Lupita. Roberta enfrenta a Diego por su campaña desleal. Después de ver a Leo besar a Lupita, Lola la abofetea y la llama mentirosa.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Diego pide a Iñaki que se infiltre en el equipo de campaña de Roberta. Los secuestradores se ponen en contacto con Mia para pedir un rescate por Miguel. Lupita se distancia de Leo e intenta arreglar las cosas con Lola, pero ésta la desprecia.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Roberta le pide a Lola que le dé otra oportunidad a Lupita. Diego le pide consejo a León para ganar las elecciones. Mia no consigue reunir la cantidad solicitada por los captores, pero Franco llega con el dinero y se disponen a rescatar a Miguel.

programme.title: Rebelde
